requested_outcome: Qualify the Phase 2 create, status, and verify plugin vertical slice without overstating support.
delivered_outcome: Versioned capability and approval contracts, deterministic mode/failure scenarios, bounded live CLI routing evidence, compatibility reporting, and operational handoff.

results.summary: Create, status, and verify are covered in all four capability modes with required failure and recovery paths.
Plans, repository effects, network, installation, data handling, and authority remain separate explicit boundaries; live checks had no tool or lifecycle effect.
Six explicit/implicit requests selected the focused skill and two unrelated prompts did not route or load extra references.
The slice is text/CLI/Markdown based, but no dedicated keyboard, screen-reader, cognitive-load, or alternative-presentation evaluation has been retained.
The exact qualified head passed 33 Python tests, Go 1.26.5 tests, documentation validation, native evidence capture, and semantic equivalence on Linux, macOS, and Windows.
Operational and evidence documentation passed the repository validator on every native runner.
The selected Codex CLI/Linux live-routing and three-OS deterministic envelope passed; other surfaces and live engine modes remain explicit limitations rather than part of this pass.
Every current pass, limitation, unavailable capability, preflight failure, usage cost, and cleanup result has an inspectable route.

limitations: Aggregate remains needs-review because packaged-engine, candidate-surface, and accessibility reviews remain open outside the selected passing envelope.
No verified packaged engine was available for live full/verification-only execution.
Accessibility remains needs-review rather than being inferred from a text-only interface.
